creator: xdevaux@xdevaux.fr
text:
ok so here it goes. I am sorry if this is the wrong person to ask for help. I am a dedicated Freebsd user. the thing is I my computer just bought a server a new ibm server zeon processors. and I have 6 hardrives with a array of raid5.
each hardrive is one TB. now when I pop the cd in the cdrom its goes through to the setup but when I go to partition the hardrive array freebsd doesnt detect it at all. what should I do please help me.
